params.name: debug
params.description: Sets the debug level

params.name: deisotope
params.description: Collapse isotope clusters to their monoisotopic peak and move multiply-charged fragments onto the singly-charged scale before peak selection

params.name: extension
params.description: Maximum residues appended per terminus; 0 disables extension

params.name: fasta
params.description: Report only tags occurring in these sequences

params.name: fixed_modifications
params.description: Fixed modifications by OpenMS/UniMod name, e.g. 'Carbamidomethyl (C)' 'TMT6plex (K)'. Shift residue masses; not annotated in the tag

params.name: force
params.description: Overrides tool-specific checks

params.name: fragment_tolerance
params.description: Fragment mass tolerance

params.name: fragment_tolerance_unit
params.description: Tolerance unit

params.name: gap_penalty
params.description: Rank gapped tags as if their E-value were this many times worse. Affects ORDER only, never which tags are reported. 1 disables. Gapped tags are otherwise heavily over-ranked: they take ~95% of top-1 slots while being ~3.6x less likely to be correct

params.name: gaps
params.description: Allow a tag to cross one missing peak, spelling the two residues either side of it from their summed mass; 0 disables

params.name: in
params.description: Input spectra

params.name: isobaric_tolerance
params.description: When matching against 'fasta', treat a residue as interchangeable with an isobaric residue pair within this tolerance; 0 requires exact strings

params.name: log
params.description: Name of log file (created only when specified)

params.name: max_evalue
params.description: E-value cutoff; 0 disables

params.name: max_peaks
params.description: Peaks retained per spectrum; 0 uses the internal ceiling of 1024, not unlimited -- the scoring tables are built to that bound. The ceiling for 'peaks_per_window'

params.name: max_tags
params.description: Tags reported per spectrum; 0 = unlimited

params.name: min_filter_length
params.description: Ignore tags shorter than this when matching against 'fasta'; 0 derives a floor from the database size

params.name: no_progress
params.description: Disables progress logging to command line

params.name: orientation
params.description: Match a tag as written, or also reversed. Tags are stored N->C under a y-ion assumption, so b-derived tags read reversed

params.name: out
params.description: Tag list (tab-separated)

params.name: out_spectra
params.description: Write spectra carrying a reported tag here (mzML, or mzpeak if this build has it). Note this path holds one slot per input spectrum, so unlike the default it needs memory proportional to the FILE, not to the thread count

params.name: peaks_per_window
params.description: Keep this many peaks per 100 Da window instead of the strongest 'max_peaks' overall; 0 disables. Scales the effective peak budget with the spectrum's m/z range, so dense spectra are not starved and sparse ones not padded

params.name: proforma
params.description: Append a ProForma 2.0 column ([+nterm]-SEQ-[+cterm]) for each tag

params.name: progress
params.description: Emit 'FASTAG_PROGRESS done=<n> total=<n>' lines to stderr for a GUI progress bar

params.name: species
params.description: Infer which taxa are present from the tags. Uses the bundled taxonomy unless -taxdb/-taxonomy_* are given, and writes <out>.species.tsv unless -species_out is given

params.name: species_min_len
params.description: Ignore tags shorter than this for taxonomy; 0 uses the index k

params.name: species_out
params.description: Ranked taxa TSV. Default: <out> with a .species.tsv suffix

params.name: species_rank
params.description: Report taxa at this NCBI rank (genus, family, ...)

params.name: subsample_fraction
params.description: Tag only this random fraction (0..1] of input spectra; 0 = all

params.name: subsample_seed
params.description: Seed for -subsample_* selection

params.name: subsample_spectra
params.description: Tag only this many randomly chosen input spectra; 0 = all

params.name: tag_length
params.description: Seed tag length in residues

params.name: taxdb
params.description: Tag->taxon index (built by buildtaxdb). Default: the bundled tax_k7.taxdb

params.name: taxonomy_names
params.description: NCBI taxonomy names.dmp. Default: the bundled names.dmp

params.name: taxonomy_nodes
params.description: NCBI taxonomy nodes.dmp. Default: the bundled nodes.dmp

params.name: test
params.description: Enables the test mode (needed for internal use only)

params.name: threads
params.description: Sets the number of threads allowed to be used by the TOPP tool (0 = all available cores)

params.name: variable_modifications
params.description: Variable modifications by OpenMS/UniMod name, e.g. 'Phospho (S)' 'Phospho (T)' 'Phospho (Y)' 'Formyl (K)'. Add a modified alternative, written inline as X[Name]

params.name: version
params.description: Version of the tool that generated this parameters file.
